chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-219 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A. No.4359/2024 (Contempt Application) 23.09.2025 Mr. Yasir Ismail Khoso, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- Learned Counsel for the Applicant/Petitioner does not press listed application, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
